name: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
quartile_or_rank: Q1 in Computational Theory & Mathematics, Hardware & Architecture, Signal Processing; SJR≈2.10
accessibility_rationale: Flagship parallel/distributed systems journal with very high SJR and h-index; widely regarded as top-tier.
desk_reject_risks: High if scope mismatch (pure theory ML, narrow education focus)
relevance_to_my_fields: Cloud scheduling, datacenter simulation, energy-aware computing, heterogeneous architectures
paper_profiles_supported: applied ML; cloud/distributed; energy-aware computing; systems; architecture
online_first_available: likely yes (Early Access via IEEE Xplore)
verification_links: Treat as top-ambition for systems/cloud/green-computing work.

name: Future Generation Computer Systems
quartile_or_rank: Q1 in Computer Networks & Communications, Hardware & Architecture, Software; SJR≈1.55–2.04
accessibility_rationale: High SJR, large but selective; core for cloud, distributed, edge, green and data-center systems.
recommended_submission_strategy: ambitious or realistic Q1 (depending on paper strength)
desk_reject_risks: Medium if off-topic (pure education, very narrow ML theory)
relevance_to_my_fields: Cloud computing, edge/serverless, scheduling, green computing, simulation platforms
recent_related_papers: Very suitable for CloudSim/CloudSim Plus, energy-aware scheduling, heterogeneous data centers.

name: Journal of Parallel and Distributed Computing
quartile_or_rank: Q1 in Computer Networks & Communications, Hardware & Architecture, Software; AI Q2; SJR≈0.98
accessibility_rationale: Q1 in core systems categories but below TPDS/FGCS in SJR; good reputation and strong applied focus.
desk_reject_risks: Medium if not clearly systems-oriented (pure pedagogy or only ML theory).
relevance_to_my_fields: Parallel/distributed systems, resource allocation, simulation, scheduling, green computing.
recent_related_papers: Strong target for solid, experimental systems work, including CloudSim-based schedulers.

name: Pattern Recognition
quartile_or_rank: Q1 in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision & Pattern Recognition, Signal Processing, Software; SJR≈2.06; IF≈9.8
accessibility_rationale: High SJR and impact, but below TPAMI/IJCV; publishes many strong but applied CV/biometrics/doc-analysis works.
recommended_submission_strategy: ambitious or realistic Q1 (depending on novelty)
best_for: applied AI, computer vision, biometrics/security, HTR/OCR/document analysis, dataset/benchmark
desk_reject_risks: High if weak evaluation, narrow dataset, or incremental without positioning.
relevance_to_my_fields: FAS/PAD, robust CV evaluation, document analysis, HTR, domain adaptation, OOD generalization.
paper_profiles_supported: applied AI; computer vision; biometrics/security; HTR/OCR/document analysis; dataset/benchmark
recent_related_papers: One of your best cross-cutting venues: FAS, HTR, robust evaluation and architecture-aware CV all fit.

name: Pattern Recognition Letters
quartile_or_rank: AI journal; SJR≈1.0; IF≈4.5 (2024)
accessibility_rationale: Lower SJR than PR; shorter-format, focused contributions; still reputable and well indexed.
best_for: applied AI, computer vision, biometrics/security, HTR/OCR/document analysis
desk_reject_risks: Medium if scope mismatch (pure education, very agricultural with no CV/PR angle).
relevance_to_my_fields: Compacted FAS/HTR methods, robust evaluation notes, dataset/test protocol notes.
paper_profiles_supported: applied AI; computer vision; biometrics/security; HTR/OCR/document analysis; dataset/benchmark
recent_related_papers: Good place for strong but narrower FAS/HTR contributions with solid experimentation.

name: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
quartile_or_rank: Q1 in CVPR & AI; extremely high SJR and IF
accessibility_rationale: Top CV/ML journal; extremely selective; used for foundational advances.
desk_reject_risks: Very high if incremental or dataset-only; expects major conceptual contributions.
relevance_to_my_fields: Foundational robust CV/ML, OOD theory, major FAS or HTR breakthroughs.
paper_profiles_supported: theoretical; applied AI; computer vision; biometrics/security
suitability_if_fast_publication_needed: very low (do not use for speed)
recent_related_papers: Use only for truly top-tier contributions.

name: International Journal of Computer Vision
